description: Decifer Trading feature backlog — dependency-gated execution order

phases.B: Alpha pipeline (IC weighting, regime router, entry thesis) — complete
phases.D: Regime intelligence (HMM, walk-forward calibration) — needs Phase C
phases.E: ML scoring layer (LightGBM, SHAP, LSTM, GT-Score) — needs Phase D

items.title: Direction-agnostic signal engine (Phase A)
Short-candidate scanner (Phase A)
Mean-reversion dimension — 9th signal (Phase A)
Directional skew tracking (Phase A)
Consensus threshold raised to 3/4 agents (Phase A)
IC-weighted signal scoring (Phase B)
Regime router — continuous multipliers replacing hard gates (Phase B)
North Star: entry thesis + hold monitoring + exit with reason (Phase B)
Regime as reasoning input — demote labels to Opus context (Phase B)
Setup-type entry learning loop — track dominant dimension vs outcome (Phase B)
Signal validation — Alphalens / IC per dimension (Phase C)
IC Phase 2 — walk-forward IC weights updated from live trades (Phase C)
HMM regime detection — hidden Markov model on SPY/VIX (Phase D)
Walk-forward weight calibration — regime-conditional IC weights (Phase D)
Options edge validation — IC per options setup type vs underlying (Phase D)
LightGBM signal classifier — replace heuristic scoring (Phase E)
SHAP pruner — eliminate low-importance dimensions per regime (Phase E)
LSTM sequence model — pattern detection across intraday bars (Phase E)
GT-Score — ensemble of LightGBM + SHAP + LSTM for final conviction score (Phase E)
Repo housekeeping — module reorganisation
items.notes: 87 flat .py files in root create navigation noise and weaken import graph boundaries. Primary value: cognitive clarity + circular-import risk reduction. Group into bot/, orders/, data/clients/, universe/, news/ packages. Tier 3 — requires full test run after. Do not attempt during active trading phases. Zero alpha value — pure housekeeping.

items.title: RELIEF_RALLY regime — gate new long entries by trade_type
items.notes: Diagnosed 2026-04-22: 5 RELIEF_RALLY longs, 0% WR, -$5,584. Root cause: Opus is told to be sceptical of longs in RELIEF_RALLY (agents.py:659) but a soft instruction loses to high-conviction signals. Proposed gate: INTRADAY longs allowed (ride the bounce), SWING/POSITION longs blocked. RELIEF_RALLY defined as: SPY+QQQ below 200d MA, VIX falling intraday (scanner.py:499-501). Regime is fully available at execute_buy call time via regime dict param. Implementation: add to _validate_order_context() in orders_core.py once Check 2 design is finalised. Deferred: need to confirm what trade_type those 5 losing trades were before locking the rule.
